---
title: "Clases"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, subtitle]
  sort: "filename"
  filter-ui: false
---

## Presentaciones del modulo

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  document.querySelectorAll(".quarto-listing a").forEach(function (a) {
    a.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
    a.setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer");
  });
});
</script>
```
